channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Significant pot hole, 3rd May
item.description:
This is a long-term pothole that continues to degrade as the concrete declines. Vehicles are constantly affected. One is unclear why this largely concrete inclined stretch was not relaid when the middle of Horsham Road gained preferential treatment, but for now kindly focus on the most significant issues in f full relaying is not feasible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Horsham Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car causing access issues, 3rd May
item.description:
Not moved in at least 6 weeks and does not belong to anyone on street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car causing access issues, 3rd May
item.description:
Car has being abandoned for weeks parked across entrance to industrial estate at very narrow part of the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike blocking bus stop on Charlton Road (stop near our Lady of Grace church., 3rd May
item.description:
HF bike parked blocking access to bus for disabled. Man in wheelchair wanting to use bus but bike was badly parked right across the spot where the ramp would come down. Two members of the public had to lift the bike out of the way. Now some little bot will email me apologizing for the inconvenience, thank me for being an HF user (as if) and offering me some free minutes on an HF bike. Well I don't ride a bike and you can stick your free minutes where the sun don't shine . HF is as big a nuisance as Lime and doesn't give a flying one for pedestrians or the disabled.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 88, Charlton Road, Charlton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kids matress and cupboard, 3rd May
item.description:
Been dumped over night

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sterry Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stupid Forest user leaves bike in no bike zone. Datchelor Place, 3rd May
item.description:
Remove it please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerously abandoned Lime bike on Highcombe SE7, 3rd May
item.description:
This morning as I walked along Highcombe I heard cries for help from a man in a motorised wheelchair who was stuck on the pavement outside Our Lady of Grace school. A Lime bike was flat on the footpath and the man could not get past or reverse into the road. Another passerby and I managed to lift the (very heavy) bike but had to leave it flat in the gutter as it was broken and would not stand upright. GET THIS BIKE SHIFTED AND FINE THE RIDER. We are all sick of Lime's VIRTUE SIGNALLING and drive for profit at the expense of courtesy and consideration. You do not give a monkey's about pedestrians or the disabled.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Highcombe, Charlton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked outside of bays, 3rd May
item.description:
Car parked outside of bays blocking entry and exit to the car park. LD25 NKU

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Flats 1-12, Edward Square, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree fallen, 3rd May
item.description:
A young chestnut tree has fallen

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Doors in road, 3rd May
item.description:
There are three internal house doors laying in the road,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Erith, Greater London

item.title: Dumped motorbike, 3rd May
item.description:
In bushes, next to fence

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blean Grove, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Martens Grove, 3rd May
item.description:
We took our children to Martens Grove yesterday and we were all shocked at how bad the playground was. The swing was missing, the zip line was broken, there were large holes in the ground. It used to be a lovely little playground but is had fallen into a state of disrepair
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lyndhurst Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian crossing keeps activating with no one there, 3rd May
item.description:
The pedestrian crossing keeps activating on its own with no one there and is causing cars to unnecessarily back up in the area
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Sydenham Road, Perry Vale, Sydenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped TV, 3rd May
item.description:
Dumped TV

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Unlit Skip, 3rd May
item.description:
Unlit skip
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Overhill Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The dirty minicab driver, Somalian male was seen in the public park penis out peeing up a wooden panel as families and children were passing. Members of the public were using the part for family days out this should not be happening., 3rd May
item.description:
Filthy mini cab Somalian peeing in public park. The dirty mini cab driver did not even wash his hands. No law and order.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterden Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drug user doing crack pipe in park on bench near children's play area., 3rd May
item.description:
Misuse of crack pipe in public park.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastway, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface dropping, 3rd May
item.description:
Following the Gas works last year, mutiple of the access points are seeing the road surface drop. Ultimately it feels due to the poor work of SGN. Maybe you should get them to come back and repair and resurface the whole of crown lane as its generally in a poor state of repair.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crown Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big pot holes by the crossing point, 3rd May
item.description:
These potholes have been here since early this year and have been reported multiple times.... yet still not fixed.,,,, What makes it worse is some potholes only yards away from these have been fixed this week. Why not these why the team were on site. Were they blind? or are the ways of working so inefficient that its designed this way. More would be filled and corrected for is they did ones when they were on site fixing nearby potholes....
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 118, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting not working, 3rd May
item.description:
All of the street lighting does not work along the slip road. It’s highly dangerous for emergency services who regularly use this slip road at high speed. The issue has been a problem for at least a few months now.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Disraeli Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet
